volume_info.title: Lighting Physics & Luminance Logic
volume_info.description: Scientific protocols for photon interaction and shadow geometry.

inverse_square_law.instruction: Calculate light fall-off based on distance. Prevent 'blown-out' highlights on metallic surfaces.

lighting_styles.name: High-Key / Commercial
lighting_styles.description: Bright, soft shadows, minimal contrast. Best for hygiene products and clean chemicals.
lighting_styles.setup: Large softboxes, 45-degree key light, wrap-around fill.

lighting_styles.name: Low-Key / Dramatic
lighting_styles.description: Deep shadows, high contrast. Best for machinery, automotive, and premium 'Hero' shots.
lighting_styles.setup: Single hard light source, rim lighting, negative fill.

lighting_styles.name: Three-Point Classic
lighting_styles.description: Key, Fill, and Backlight. Ensures 3D volume and separation.
lighting_styles.setup: Key at 45 deg, Fill at 0 deg (half power), Rim at 170 deg.

shadow_geometry.shadow_hardness: Controlled by light source size relative to subject (Penumbra width).
shadow_geometry.contact_shadows: Ambient Occlusion (AO) protocol. Must ensure dark contact points where objects touch surfaces.
